the method getSourceLeavesAndUpdatedLeaves() compares the leaves of reference and comparand nodes,

So here we can have 2 scenarios
1. first I compare common leaves between reference and comparand nodes, which might have changed over time so a simple comparison of their values, if a value is changed it is captured as an update operation
2. there is a possibility of some leaves not present in reference node but only in comparand node, so I have taken them as uniqueLeavesOfComparandDataNode node and captured them as update operation separately

the terms source are causing a confusion so I refactored the code to have a consistent naming.

Marking this as resolved

as of current patch the DeltaReport POJO resembles the rfc standard as closely aa possible with a few parameter names differing as per requirement of CPS.
As of now the following format is used for delta report
  action: "UPDATE"
  xpath: "/bookstore/categories/[@code=2]"
  source-data:
    name: "Funny"
  target-data:
    name: "Comic"
